response.justification: The candidate is a technically broad and capable individual contributor with over 15 years of development experience across web, mobile, embedded, and systems programming, and has meaningful exposure to developer tooling (CI/CD infrastructure, test frameworks, AI/MCP tooling). However, this role is explicitly a full-time people leadership position requiring demonstrated people management, and the resume contains no evidence whatsoever of managing direct reports, conducting performance reviews, or leading an engineering team. All 'Staff' roles appear to be senior IC positions. The absence of this core competency is a disqualifying gap for a mid-to-senior engineering manager hire.
strengths: 15+ years of software development experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and systems — well above the 8-year minimum
Hands-on developer tooling work including CI/CD server setup, GitLab administration, test infrastructure (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), and AI-agent/MCP code generators
Strong knowledge-sharing culture evidenced by conference talks, multi-day workshops, and organizing recurring Refactoring Dojos and Code Katas
concerns: Zero evidence of people management — no direct reports, no 1:1s, no performance or career development ownership, which is the central requirement of this role
No demonstrated strategic roadmap planning, organizational change leadership, or cross-team alignment at a management level
Mobile experience is limited to end-user app development (iOS/tvOS), not engineering productivity tooling or build infrastructure for a mobile platform ecosystem

key_factors.factor: No strategic or organizational leadership evidence
